Notes: Render לְפָנַי as 'to my face' (not 'before my face' which is double translation). Keep preposition preceding. Editor ISA 48:19.
Use singular agent noun. Prefer 'dweller' over 'inhabitant' for יֹשֵׁב here; not plural 'inhabitants'.
Hebrew is plural; render 'bereavements' not singular 'bereavement'.

Context: ISA 49:24-25 - singular noun in captive/captive of a warrior
Notes: Use singular 'captive' in both verses, not plural 'captives'.
